Quiss 2D DO'S and Don'ts (1) > Unknown Chapter > Sop For Isra Vision

section: Do'S And Don'Ts For Quiss2D Bead Inspection
text:
Ensure that Cell Mode and RTV.t2D software are always in Automatic Mode and log in to the PC with Root acess.
1
Always perform the system start-up procedure before starting production.
2
Keep the sensor (Camera),Cabinet,PC,Calibration unit,and station clean and free from dust.
3
Clean the nozzle at regular intervals or immediately if dirt or excess glue is found.
4
Clean the camera lens at the beginning of each shift using fresh cotton and glass IPA cleaner.
5
Ensure that all products are activated in the RTV.2D Sofware.
6
Before performing maintenance or replacing any cabinet, sensor, or cable , close the software and Switch off the system power.
7
Direct main power off should be avoided
8
Take regular backups of product data and robot programs, especially before planned maintenance or software changes.
9
hierarchy_path: Quiss 2D DO'S and Don'ts (1) > Unknown Chapter > Do'S And Don'Ts For Quiss2D Bead Inspection

section: Do'S And Don'Ts For Quiss2D Bead Inspection
text:
8
Take regular backups of product data and robot programs, especially before planned maintenance or software changes.
9
Inform the Team Leader before making any changes to system parameters and follow plant procedures.
10
If any software client stops responding, end the task though Task Manager and restart the software.
11
Never change cell mode or RTV3D software is in Manual mode in production.
1
Don't interrupt the vision Inspection cycle in-between
2
Never Power Off and Power ON the system immediately. Give 3mins gap.
3
Don't deactivate the products in production for any changes.
4
Don't disconnect the sensor cable without the system Power OFF
5
Don't change any Configuration settings without supervisor instructions
6
Don't change other PC settings without Information
7
Don't close the software or turn of PC during the production
8
